About.title: TECHNICAL_MANIFESTO
About.mission_text: At Cygnus, Robots & Humans, LLC, our mission is to simplify technical complexity. We don't just configure servers; we build robust architectures that evolve with our clients' needs.
About.vision_text: We visualize a world where virtualization and IoT automation are accessible and secure for everyone. From Virginia Beach towards the digital future.
About.experience_text: Years of specialization in Proxmox, ZimaOS, and advanced networking solutions position us as leaders in modern technical consultancy.
